name: TMA scope toggle on /budgets/new
description: TMA `/budgets/new` adds a scope toggle. Choosing 'Cá nhân' hides the household `<select>` and shows a `Currency` selector (VND default, allow any 3-letter code). Choosing 'Household' hides the currency and shows the household `<select>` (admin-only, current behaviour). Submission builds the scope-aware payload via extended `buildBudgetMutationRequest`.

done: Updated `apps/tma/src/features/budgets/pages/create-budget-page.tsx` with `SegmentedControl` scope selector, conditional household/currency fields, and scope-aware validation.
Updated `apps/tma/src/features/budgets/pages/budget-list-page.tsx` with scope filter chips (Tất cả / Household / Cá nhân), household select in household mode, and scope-tagged budget cards.
Updated `apps/tma/src/features/budgets/pages/budget-detail-page.tsx` with scope label via `getBudgetScopeLabel` and personal-budget ownership-based `canManage`.
Updated `apps/tma/src/test/budget-presentation.test.ts` for new `BudgetDTO` shape and personal-budget `buildBudgetMutationRequest` assertions.
TMA typecheck + lint + test + build OK via `./init.sh`.
